original_image_tags: This is a single page from a US government UAP / FBI / military / NASA / State Department archive. The page is a typewritten transmittal sheet with a distribution list of 62 names, most of which are redacted. The page is marked "RECEIVED FBI" and "MAY 22 3:37 PM '69" and "SPECIAL INQUIRY SECTION JUSTICE". There are also stamps for "RECEIVED-GALE" and "REC'D BISHOP FBI" with dates in May 1969. A handwritten note in the bottom right corner reads "REC'D DELACH FBI". The document is heavily redacted, with many names and details blacked out.
